title: Senior Software Engineer - Wipro - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Wipro - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Wipro has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wipro:
Wipro is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro!
